title: REQ frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block on each docs/requirements/active/REQ-NNN-*.md.

id.description: Zero-padded REQ id, e.g. REQ-001. Auto-assigned by /sn-req new.

requires.description: REQ ids that must complete before this one starts. Topo-sorted by the orchestrator.

acceptance.description: One bullet per acceptance criterion. Keep them testable.

eval_threshold.description: Minimum sn-evaluator score (0-100) for the triple-signal gate to pass.
